label: Reaction Mechanisms
description: Bond formation, bond breaking, catalytic cycles, and mechanistic transformations.

label: Measurement and Analysis
description: Analytical chemistry, chromatography, spectroscopy, calibration, and validation.

label: Materials and Surfaces
description: Materials synthesis, surfaces, nanomaterials, deposition, adsorption, and defects.

description: Free energy, equilibrium, chemical potential, rates, and Arrhenius behavior.

description: Quantum calculations, DFT, molecular dynamics, orbitals, and reaction pathways.
